sources.name: Solano County Library
sources.notes: Communico tenant: solanolibrary. The fetcher auto-builds /eeventcaldata?req=… with today's date + windowDays and merges /v1/{tenant}/locations for branch geo.

sources.name: Sunnyvale Public Library
sources.notes: CivicPlus calendar (HTML table). Akamai blocks default fetcher headers — requiresBrowserHeaders sends a full Chrome header set (Sec-Fetch-* etc.) which is enough to clear the bot challenge.

sources.name: Santa Clara City Library
sources.notes: Same CivicPlus calendar markup as Sunnyvale; the requiresBrowserHeaders flag bypasses the Akamai 403.

sources.name: Santa Clara County Parks
sources.disabledReason: Official Santa Clara County Parks event page returns a Cloudflare challenge/block page to automated fetches in this environment.

sources.name: Ticketmaster Bay Area Family Events
sources.ticketmasterAllowedPattern: Family|Children|children under|Recommended ages?|Disney|Beauty And The Beast|Phantom Of The Opera|all guests require ticket
sources.notes: Runs when TICKETMASTER_API_KEY is present. Family classification alone is sparse in the Bay Area, so the source also uses narrow arts/theatre keyword queries and parser-side filters.

sources.name: Stanford Events
sources.notes: Official Stanford Localist calendar, narrowed to public arts, museum, tour, workshop, film, performance, and reception event types. The parser requires Everyone or General Public audience and filters out internal academic meetings.

officialTextEvents.title: 55th Annual Stanford Powwow
officialTextEvents.description: Native American dance, music, food, and information vendors at Eucalyptus Grove. Mother's Day weekend tradition open to the public.

officialTextEvents.title: 55th Annual Stanford Powwow
officialTextEvents.description: Saturday day of the Stanford Powwow at Eucalyptus Grove with Grand Entries at 1pm and 7pm.

officialTextEvents.title: 55th Annual Stanford Powwow
officialTextEvents.description: Final day (Mother's Day) of the Stanford Powwow at Eucalyptus Grove. Grand Entry at 1pm.

sources.name: Half Moon Bay Wine & Jazz Festival

officialTextEvents.title: Half Moon Bay Wine & Jazz Festival
officialTextEvents.description: Fifth annual wine tasting and live jazz on Main Street, with 50 California wineries, food, and a craft beer & cider garden.
officialTextEvents.venue: Main Street, Downtown Half Moon Bay

officialTextEvents.title: Taiwanese American Cultural Festival
officialTextEvents.description: 33rd annual Taiwanese American Cultural Festival at Union Square. Vendors, traditional and contemporary performances, Taiwanese food, family-friendly.

officialTextEvents.title: Scout-O-Rama Community Family Festival
officialTextEvents.description: 100+ hands-on family activities at History Park: archery, water rockets, tomahawk throwing, fire trucks, pinewood derby, slacklining, crafts, life-size mazes, plus live entertainment.

sources.name: Hawaiian May Day Festival (Kumu Hula Association of Northern California)

officialTextEvents.title: Hawaiian May Day Festival
officialTextEvents.description: Mother's Day weekend celebration of Hawaiian and Polynesian culture: hula hālau, Hawaiian/reggae music, ethnic food, and craft vendors at the Alameda County Fairgrounds.

officialTextEvents.title: Hawaiian May Day Festival
officialTextEvents.description: Mother's Day Hawaiian and Polynesian cultural celebration at the Alameda County Fairgrounds.

sources.name: Berkeley Mother's Day: Hats and High Tea

officialTextEvents.title: Mother's Day Hats and High Tea at Berkeley Rose Garden
officialTextEvents.description: Free family-friendly Mother's Day celebration with live jazz, charcuterie, desserts, kids' card-making, bead jewelry, glitter tattoos, and a bubble show at the Berkeley Rose Garden.

officialTextEvents.title: Golden Gate Park Band Mother's Day Pops Concert
officialTextEvents.description: Free outdoor concert at the Spreckels Temple of Music in honor of Mother's Day. Works by Leroy Anderson, Gilbert & Sullivan, and a clarinet premiere.
officialTextEvents.venue: Spreckels Temple of Music, Music Concourse, Golden Gate Park

sources.name: Redwood City "Almost" Mother's Day Kids' Concert

officialTextEvents.title: "Almost" Mother's Day Kids' Concert
officialTextEvents.description: Kids' concert with kindie rocker Andy Z and the Andyland Band, plus an inflatable playland and Mother's Day gift craft area at Red Morton Park (next to Magical Bridge Playground).

officialTextEvents.title: Gilroy Gardens Mother's Day (Mom Free with Child Admission)
officialTextEvents.description: Mom and grandma get in free with the purchase of a child admission. Mother's Day Tea Party on the Creekside Terrace also available.

sources.name: Inner Sunset Flea Market
sources.notes: Recurring 2nd Sunday April through November on Irving Street between 9th and 11th Avenues. Free admission.

sources.name: Niles Canyon Railway
sources.notes: Heritage railway running scenic train rides on the second and third weekends Mar–Oct from the Sunol Depot. Departures 10:30am and 1pm. Tickets required.

sources.name: San Francisco Botanical Garden
sources.notes: Free for SF residents with proof of residency. Visit page for hours and seasonal programs.

sources.name: Conservatory of Flowers
sources.notes: Historic Victorian glasshouse in Golden Gate Park. Free for SF residents on the first Tuesday of the month.

sources.name: Japanese Tea Garden
sources.notes: Free admission for SF residents Mon/Wed/Fri before 10am with proof of residency.

sources.name: Ardenwood Historic Farm
sources.notes: 1880s working farm operated by East Bay Regional Park District. Tours, hayrides, blacksmith demonstrations.
